rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §252.014 governs preservation of campaign treasurer appointments. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: The authority with whom a campaign treasurer appointment is filed under this chapter shall preserve the appointment for two years after the date the appointment is terminated.
_note: Rule text addresses campaign finance recordkeeping; no overlap with homestead exemption policy.
